programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Daniel pierde contacto con la realidad mientras lucha con la vida después del corredor de la muerte. Tras una noche de tintes surrealistas con un misterioso desconocido, se enfrenta con Ted Jr., quien cuestiona la inocencia de Daniel.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: La ira del pueblo llega a su punto de ebullición, y la familia de Daniel se pone en alerta. Foulkes reclama un nuevo juicio. Ted Jr. y Tawney se recuperan de encuentros perturbadores. Trey Willis busca al desaparecido George Melton.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: La familia de Daniel teme que no se recupere de las heridas y que sus atacantes escapen a la justicia. Judy Dean demuestra a Bobby un poco de afecto inesperado. Ted Jr. oculta a su esposa un secreto. El Sheriff Daggett investiga la paliza a Daniel.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Amantha teme lo peor mientras espera que Daniel despierte del coma inducido. Los planes de negocio de Teddy se ven frustrados por su padre, mientras recibe noticias no gratas de Tawney. Jared conoce mejor a su hermano y a la difunta Hanna Dean.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Daniel toma una sorprendente decisión que indigna a Amantha, sobre todo cuando Janet lo apoya. Teddy pide un favor al reacio Tawney. Jon Stern recibe información importante sobre el caso de un cliente. El Sheriff Daggett interroga a Bobby Dean.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Recuperado, Daniel explora Atlanta y disfruta del anonimato en la gran ciudad, mientras Amantha empaca sus cosas. Los continuos cambios de humor de Ted Jr. frustran a Tawney más y más, forzándolo a buscar comprensión en un lugar inesperado.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Daniel conoce a un extraño emprendedor local que le hace una oferta inverosímil. Amantha se esfuerza por adaptarse a los desafíos de su nuevo rol. Teddy se involucra con Tawney, quien toma una sorprendente decisión.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Daniel provoca a sus enemigos apareciendo en el funeral de alguien de su pasado y preocupa a su familia al desaparecer en una peligrosa misión. Janet festeja su cumpleaños junto a su marido y sus hijos, quienes le dan un par de gratas sorpresas.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Daniel continua buscando respuestas. Jon Stern tiene una esclarecedora conversación con la fiscal del distrito Sondra Person. El senador Foulkes obliga al sheriff Daggett a que lo ayude con una tarea. Amantha se involucra con un compañero de trabajo.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Daniel pide ayuda de mala gana. Janet descubre sus propios errores. Jon Stern revela una sorprendente noticia que provoca un acalorado debate familiar. Jared busca consuelo en Ted Jr. y Tawney. CJ Pickens ofrece información inquietante.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Daniel sopesa su futuro a la vez que enfrenta una difícil decisión. Amantha libera estrés. Acontecimientos recientes frustran a Ted Jr., mientras Tawney arma sus planes. Daggett visita a Benji Melton. Ted Sr. toma medidas para proteger a su familia.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: Daniel pone en duda el consejo de Jon Stern. Tawney reconsidera sus decisiones y Ted Jr. le pide un favor. Janet descubre algo inquietante. Amantha se sincera con Jon Stern. El sheriff Daggett investiga una pista.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: La familia de Daniel lidia con su confesión y destierro inminente. Ted Jr. trata de conectar con Tawney. Ted Sr. enfrenta a Daniel. El senador Foulkes no da importancia a las preguntas de Person, la fiscal del distrito, sobre la muerte de Hanna.

programme.title: Rectify
programme.desc: A Daniel le cuesta adaptarse a sus nuevas circunstancias mientras Amantha se enfrenta a apabullantes cambios personales y a problemas en el trabajo. Tawney busca consuelo y encuentra incertidumbre. Teddy busca reconectar con Tawney.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: When the cast arrives in Los Angeles, they are teamed with their sisters; the twins are treated as outsiders; a pair of sisters cannot stop bickering; a secret is revealed.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: The twins can't seem to shake their role as outsiders and are shocked when their roommates attempt to evict them; further investigation into Olivia's medical condition leaves the housemates wondering who they can trust.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: When replacement sisters arrive, the roommates attempt to drive them out with a wild prank that goes too far; Olivia deals with backlash from her big lie; tension between Kristina and Angela comes to a head.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon looks to re-establish a sense of unity at O'Banion's in Nebraska, where a binge-drinking owner has been usurped in a hostile takeover by his partners.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get a lenient bar owner to reign in his raucous over-pouring bartenders if he is going to save a dated Burbank, CA, sports bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Pepe's Mexican Restaurant & Cantina in Canyon Lake, California, to help a once-bustling bar that's now a ghost town and open the disconnected owners' eyes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Midvale, Utah, to meet The Union owner Bill, who is over $500,000 in debt and hasn't picked up any of the bar knowledge required to help his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Two best friends are acting more like jackasses than owners and find themselves on the verge of losing their dream.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon does reconnaissance at Kalaveraz Cocina-Cantina in Escondido, California, and finds an owner so in over his head that he's resorted to not paying his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon steps in to save J.A. Murphy's, a dive bar in Fell's Point, MD, on the brink of financial and physical collapse.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A successful St. Louis, MO, restaurateur risks everything when she decides to add a downtown sports bar to her portfolio and put her out-of-control nephew in charge.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owners of Marley's on the Beach may lose their business and their marriage if Jon can't reverse the financial strain put on them by the failings of their bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads back to Puerto Rico to help brother-and-sister bar owners who saw their business devastated by Hurricane Maria.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon attempts to save the legendary Las Vegas speakeasy Capo's Restaurant and bring it back to its pre-pandemic glory.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A bar owner's relationship with her incompetent manager causes complications as Jon tries to save their failing Irish pub on a Redondo Beach pier.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a struggling establishment figure out if it's a club, a restaurant, or a bar, in the highly competitive market of Las Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The eccentric owner of Brix Wine Bar is too busy being the life of the party to notice his business is withering on the vine.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig, Cort, and Eddie take a road trip to Mexico, but their vacation south of the border turns ugly when they tangle with an angry American tourist. Meanwhile, Captian Thorpe becomes Mitch's uninvited house guest. Hobie develops a crush on Shauni.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cort and Eddie train lifeguards at a water park, but someone is vandalizing the waterslides, putting people's lives in danger. Meanwhile, Captain Thorpe wants Shauni fired for posing in a provocative calendar.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie and Cort happen upon an illegal gambling ship. Meanwhile, Mitch begins to spend more time with Hobie's English teacher – a liaison that embarrasses Hobie beyond belief.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After losing his rookie partner in the mysterious rescue of what he thinks is a ghost, Eddie gets unwittingly caught up in a 70-year-old legend. Meanwhile, Hobie attempts to help a friend find a new home for her dog.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A local restaurateur puts up a $25,000 bounty for the largest shark caught during the weekend's Shark Derby he's sponsoring. To attract more sharks, he illegally chums the waters, drawing hundreds of sharks uncommonly close to shore.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cort promises to come up with $10,000 for a nursing home, but he needs Mitch and Craig's help to compete in a water-skiing race with a big cash prize. Shauni’s traumatic fear of the ocean after Jill’s death threatens her future with Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig, Mitch, and Garner go for a weekend hang-gliding trip, but Mitch has a serious accident, and ends up facing death before the fangs of a rattlesnake! Cort reacquaints himself with a woman who has a shocking secret.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A massive earthquake destroys Baywatch headquarters and leaves Gina's life hanging in the balance. Meanwhile, Cort and Craig are trapped in the ocean. And Eddie is the only one left who can help a pregnant woman going into labor.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch rescues an underwater photographer that appears to have been attacked by a Sea Creature in an underwater cave, resulting in a media frenzy. Shauni rescues a young girl in the ocean then has to rescue her family from drowning.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a fishing trawler mysteriously sinks, the “Creature in the Bay” is thought responsible! Mitch, Devon and Captain Thorpe set out to prove there is more than meets the eye behind this Creature's mysterious attacks.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Baywatch lifeguard Megan is attacked on the beach, she struggles to regain her confidence – unaware that her attacker, a fisherman, views her as the "One That Got Away." Meanwhile, Shauni suffers from lifeguard burnout.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives an unexpected visit from his free-spirited brother, whose troubled son entices Hobie to surf the pylons of a treacherous condemned pier. Meanwhile, a local vendor nearly causes a riot when his bikinis disintegrate in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Last Emperor' comes home for Bellator MMA’s first event in Russia as MMA Heavy-weight G.O.A.T Fedor Emelianenko enters the cage for one of the final fights of his historic career to take on one of the division’s top contenders, #2 ranked Tim Johnson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Bellator MMA Lightweight World Championship is on the line as Dub-lin’s own Peter 'The Showstopper' Queally collides with Patricky Pitbull. And Irish phenom James 'The Strabanimal' Gallagher battles it out with Patchy 'No Love' Mix.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: One of the greatest mixed martial artists of all-time returns when Cris Cyborg puts her Bellator MMA Women’s Featherweight World Championship on the line against Irish knockout artist Sinead 'KO' Kavanagh.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Champion Sergio Pettis battles Rizin Fighting Federation Bantamweight World Champion Kyoji Horiguchi, and former Bellator MMA world title challenger Emmanuel Sanchez squares off with Jeremy Kennedy.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader takes on Interim Heavyweight World Champion Valentin Moldavsky in a title unification bout to determine the true king of the division.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Mohegan Sun as Neiman Gracie, battles it out with hard-hitting former All-American wrestler, Logan 'Storm' Storley in the first five round non-title fight in promotional history.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Dublin as the Middleweight World Championship is on the line as Gegard 'The Dreamcatcher' Mousasi, defends his belt against the division’s top ranked contender Austin 'The Gentleman' Vanderford.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to St. Louis with an opportunity to challenge for the Bellator MMA Featherweight World Championship when hard-hitting Hungarian dynamo Adam 'The Kid' Borics clashes with Danish submission specialist Mads Burnell.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: AJ 'Mercenary' McKee puts his Bellator MMA Featherweight World Championship on the line against former world champ Patricio Pitbull in a highly anticipated rematch to determine the greatest featherweight on the planet.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shemida says she has been diagnosed with more than 70 medical and mental health conditions and prescribed more than 80 medications over a 10-year span. Her sister, Dana, believes Shemida fabricates her issues for attention. Is Shemida really sick? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After 21 years, Paula is considering divorcing husband, Jeremy, saying he's "clueless, absent & non-verbal." Jeremy says it's Paula--controlling & a grudge-holder. Find out Jeremy's mistake. Dr. Phil and Robin share the secret to their 45-year marriage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a beautiful mother of two, vanished in 2009. Her husband, Josh, was considered a person of interest & what began as an unsolved mystery tragically ended with the murder-suicide of Josh Powell & their two sons, Charles, 7, & Braden, 5.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From sending sexual text messages to taking a punch to the face for fun, today's teens are engaging in outrageous trends. Dr. Phil helps parents decide what behavior is normal and what is out of control.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pam says her ex-husband, Ed, is enabling, Andee's, 24, addiction by giving her money, which she uses for drugs. Ed admits he allows Andee to manipulate him but says he's afraid she'll resort to prostitution or worse. Can Ed learn to change his approach?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tracey says her 23-year marriage is falling apart because husband Doug is having an affair with transgender female Essence. Tracey wants Doug to choose once and for all so that she can move on with her life. Why is she leaving the decision to him?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Paula says her 19-year-old daughter, Kylie is on a path of self-destruction, but Kylie says Paula is at fault for being a bad role model. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pregnancy is a time of baby showers, nesting, indulging food cravings and being pampered. But Dr. Phil’s guests, Shayna, says she's been pregnant more than a year, and Zona, says she's been pregnant over 3 1/2 years, Both are looking for answers why.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lovie says a viral video of her son Darnell shows him attacking his girlfriend & dragging her. Darnell says he doesn't recognize himself & he wants to apologize to the world. Brianna says the attack was one of three beatings her sister endured that night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angie says she's fed up with husband Jason's, mom, Kathy. Angie says her mother-in-law is rude, judgmental & meddles. Kathy says Angie is a liar & cheater & she's responsible for all the drama. Can Dr. Phil help these in-laws put years of animosity aside?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's interview with death row inmate Rodney Reed continues. Reed's attorney, Bryce Benjet tells what he thinks happened to Stacey. Retired NYPD detective Kevin Gannon & criminologist Dr. Lee Gilbertson say they know who killed Stacey & how.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kirby made headlines -- and spent 13 weeks in jail -- after his wife, Renee, videotaped him spanking her with a wooden spoon. Hear why Kirby claims Renee left him no choice but to act as he did. Plus, what other behavior did Renee catch on camera? Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he is in a bitter custody battle with ex Kimberly, who's kept him from seeing their three kids. Kimberly says Brad is unstable & irresponsible and until he cleans up his act, he can't see their kids. Can these exes learn to peacefully co-parent?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues investigating Lois' online relationships. Dr. Phil backs a search to Nigeria to locate Lois' current fiancé, "Paul Shaw." Lois asks Dr. Phil to fly him to the U.S. so they can start their future together. Conclusion Pt. 3

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Comedian Celeste Barber, known for her hilarious celebrity parodies, joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover the latest headlines including the one perk employees most wish their employer would offer and share Rihanna's latest collab.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Shotgun Wedding" star D'Arcy Carden is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover today's hottest stories like the woman who invited all her ex-boyfriends to her wedding and put them at a table together and the newest trend of eating alone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics. Stephanie Izard is joining Drew in the kitchen to make something delicious. Eve Rodsky is sharing home equity tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Equalizer" star Queen Latifah stops by to chat. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, In A Minute Ross is sharing an all new delicious Rossipe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Horticulturist Christopher Freimuth shares holiday decor tips. Drew & Ross report on E.T. auction & benefits of being in the rain. James Warren talks about building benches at local bus stops.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving today's news sunny-side up. Danny Seo is sharing three under $30 bathroom essentials and tips for how to clean your toilet better.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Fashion Icon Victoria Beckham is dishing on her Paris Fashion Week debut, that signature leg pose, her daughter's thoughts on her Spice Girls wardrobe and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plane" star Gerard Butler is chatting about his new film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering the week's hottest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Emily in Paris" stars Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo are joining Drew for a round of Drew & A. Pilar Valdes is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some yummy crepes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is chatting with actress Katherine Heiglabout the return of "Firefly Lane" and more.Plus, inan all-new Drew's News, Katherine Heigl joinsDrew and Ross Mathewsat the news desk to hit the headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson is filling in for Drew as co-host for the day! Comedian Ziwe Fumudoh stops by to chat about the new season of her late-night talk show "Ziwe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Paris in Love" star Paris Hilton joins Drew to chat. Then, CBS News Anchor Michelle Miller is helping Drew and Ross hit the headlines at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, upcycling expert Sarah Teresinski is transforming items off the street that she found on the Stooping NYC Instagram page.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Magnolia Network's" Joanna Gaines and Drew are going roller skating and chatting everything home renovation.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, in an all-new Cookbook Club Molly Yeh joins Drew in the kitchen to whip up a yummy and comforting dish from her new cookbook, "Home is Where the Eggs Are.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's a special edition of Drew's News on location at Comic Con with iconic actress and star of "Halloween Ends" Jamie Lee Curtis joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Sophia Roe is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up something delicious. Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in Drew's News and sharing their best weekend suggestions.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews host Drew MerryMore X People Magazine Holiday Giveaway. Studio audience of Drew-gooders get $300K in gifts. Drew highlights Drew-Gooders making difference in community.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is evicted because his 50 cent allowance won't cover the rent. The other Clampetts take over the space with Granny will cut hair or pull teeth. Jed will sharpen tools and whittle something. Ellie is the pretty receptionist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the Clampetts established in business in Jethro's vacated office space, a building inspector visits to find out about their business operations on the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale hires a troubleshooter for the bank. His main mission is to get the Clampetts to close their business operating out of the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sam Drucker comes to Beverly Hills to visit, and Granny assumes he's interested in courting her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro meets Mrs. Drysdale's guru and decides he wants to be one also. Granny thinks it's all nonsense, but when she tries to put a stop to it the followers find her common sense inspiring and make her the head guru.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Drysdales now jog so the banker can get the account of Jason Detweiler, head of a running club. The Clampetts don't understand the concept, leading to misunderstandings, then Ellie and Jethro become enthusiastic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Famous singer Pat Boone is in the neighborhood and smells Granny's cooking. He wanders into their backyard and the Clampetts befriend him, thinking he's a hill country man down on his luck.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies move back to the hills to find Elly May a husband, much to the dismay of banker Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts arrive in the mountain town of Silver Dollar City, where Granny starts a feud with an old rival, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny continues her efforts to get Elly May married, extolling the young girl's virtues to every bachelor she meets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Bird watcher Jane Hathaway hikes into the woods and finds a man for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts rehearse for Elly May's wedding to backwoodsman Matthew Templeton, unaware that banker Drysdale wants it stopped.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale and Jane arrive in New York to persuade the hillbillies to abandon their half-built cabin in Central Park and return home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny insists she doesn't need glasses, although she carries on a conversation with a pet seal, thinking it's Elly's new boyfriend.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellems, proprietor of the hotel in Silver Dollar, sells out and leaves the hills to join the Clampetts in California.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny uses her shotgun as she punishes Jethro for leading too wild a Hollywood life with Shorty Kellems.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale's nephew, who possesses a wealth of confidence but no talent, takes over Drysdale's private office at his Beverly Hills Bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts visit Hooterville and Jed arranges to go into the airline business with pilot Steve Elliott.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Drysdale eagerly prepares to set up the deal for a new airline formed by Jed and farmer Howard Hewes, thinking him the famous millionaire Howard Hughes.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett and Shad Heller conspire to line up Shorty Kellems as a husband for the strong-minded widow, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies unsuccessfully conspire to get Shorty Kellems married to Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elusive Shorty Kellems gets off the marital hook by convincing his eager bride-to-be that he is an inveterate gambler.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Shad Heller discover it's a full time job keeping Shorty Kellems corralled until his marriage to the indomitable Elverna.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellms again short circuits fiancee Elverna's wedding plans, this time by marrying Mr. Drysdale's prettiest secretary.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts set up a miniature farm so Shorty's bride Gloria can sample farm life, and soon the exhausted girl is delighted to hear she's not really married.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies leave Shorty Kellems temporarily in charge of the Clampett mansion and he turns it into a hotel for single secretaries.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampett mansion is set up as a hotel for women, and banker Drysdale decides to extort a few dollars from his secretary guests.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Mariah comes to town to give a lecture at the university's new age festival. She develops an instant connection with Kelly, prompting Tracy to bristle. David tries to plan a special evening for Donna.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon has to take care of Kelly and Valerie, who are both laid up with the flu. The girls discuss the reasons for their feud.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kelly learns that she is pregnant. Val makes a pass at David, prompting Donna to order him to end their working relationship. Clare is saddened by Mother's Day, so Steve tries to take her mind off things by going for a drive.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon is heartbroken when Kelly is unable to remember their relationship. Valerie helps organize Donna when she has trouble keeping track of her clients. Donna decides to make Val her business partner.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kelly moves back into the beach apartment. A designer offers to purchase Donna's work. David manages a rock band and allows the lead singer to crash at the apartment.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Donna discover that Rush owns the building that houses the sweatshop. David's credit problems escalate. Kelly fails to identify the shooter from the police lineup.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon's overprotection alienates Kelly; Donna learns she's been stabbed in the back by Valerie, who juggles her rich man and her poor man on a dinner cruise attended by Steve and Carly.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Erica is arrested for prostitution and released into Kelly and Brandon's custody. Jodi claims that Steve is the only man who could have possibly fathered her child. Mel helps David file for bankruptcy and pay back Donna.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon is arrested for obstructing justice. David moves into the office at the After Dark and accidentally starts a fire. Valerie visits Sands and learns that Noah paid off David's debt.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Dr. Monahan's behavior unnerves Kelly as he checks out her injured shoulder. Valerie warns Noah that he may be in over his head trying to manage the After Dark.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Dr. Monahan makes inappropriate advances toward Kelly. David and Valerie proceed with their plan to make their exes jealous. Steve performs at the After Dark's comedy showcase.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kelly considers filing sexual harassment charges against Monahan, but does not want to interfere with a fundraiser for the clinic. Val and David realize how much they mean to each other.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Dr. Monahan forces Kelly out of the clinic. Brandon and Steve hire a new assistant, Janet Sosna; and bring David aboard as a music reviewer. Valerie cuts a deal with a bookie operating at the After Dark.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: David tries to make amends after his first music review gets the artist fired; Valerie ignores Noah's decree to halt the sports betting at the club.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will eviction history repeat itself for Jag, or will the chillbillie be left out in the cold? Plus, who will become the next Head of Household?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Humila Week is under way and the space cowboy is in control. Will Cameron cause chaos and shake up the house?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The Power of Veto is on the line, with special guest host Josh Duhamel. Will the golden power save one of the nominees, and will Cameron shock the house by backdooring Cirie?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: One of Cirie's top allies exits the game, but will it be who she expects? Plus, the Head of Household is on the line in the iconic Wall Competition and the Houseguests come face-to-face with a legendary meatball.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will conquer the wall and become the new Head of Household, and which houseguest will be targeted for eviction? Plus witness the war of words that blew the house apart before Izzys departure.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the Power of Veto, and will the plan to get Cameron on the block succeed?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will Cameron finally be evicted from the House? Who will follow? A terrifying Double Eviction kicks off Scary Week, a full week of gameplay and one night of fright. Plus, a scary ending that will send shivers down the spines of all who survive.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Jared and Cameron return from the grave as BB zombies, how will the house react to this spine-tingling twist? Plus witness all the crazy drama you didn't see during the death-defying double.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Which zombie will emerge from the Resurrection Rumble, with the power to put fate in his own hands? And who will have their game dead and buried for good?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The game resumes with the final ten vying for the Head of Household. Who will win the power, and which two guests will be put on the chopping block?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will Felicia or Mecole's soul be saved at the Veto Competition? And will Cameron's target change to a bombshell backdoor?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will Cory be back-doored? Or will Felicia stay in the line of fire? And who will be the final Houseguest evicted before Jury begins? Plus, a new Head of Household will be crowned.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: For weeks, the DJ has been laying low, but what happens when she's in charge? And which houseguests will she throw on the barbie at nominations?

programme.desc: Airline pilot Whip Whitaker miraculously lands his plane after a mid-air catastrophe but questions arise as to who or what was really at fault.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred and Lamont find themselves stranded in the forest. Their plan was to have a heart-to-heart talk before Lamont's marriage, but the truck breaks down, leaving them helpless and without food. Feeling doomed, they let their lives pass before their eyes.

programme.title: Sanford and Son

programme.title: Sanford and Son

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A chilling effect.
Mary's partnership with a local baker turns stale when he tries to con her out of a cookie recipe that could be worth a fortune.
In a flashback, Sandra recaps the highlights of her Love Connection date--which ruined Mary's dinner party and nearly cost Lester an important business deal.
When a rich old man's fancy turns to thoughts of love and marriage, fiscally-minded Sandra must decide if making her geriatric suitor's final days happy is worth giving up her playgirl lifestyle.

After Dylan loses the kids' senior prom money in a bad stock investment, Mary tries to save the day by disguising herself as a rock magazine editor to persuade the famous rap group 'Run D.M.C.' to perform for free.
A deadlocked jury forces jurors Mary and Sandra to spend the night together in a hotel roam on Mary's anniversary, but a lonely Lester and a flirtatious bailiff keep the girls entertained.
Mary and Rose bet Sandra that they can stay on a diet longer than she can go without a date, but no one plays fair and the building swarms with good looking men and tempting taste treats.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser fires his shot at Ryan and the two confront each other in a showdown. Relationship issues continue to worry Donna and Alex, while Walt has his own tale of woe. Ceaser receives news that could threaten the very existence of Black Ink New York.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and the crew are still reeling from the news that the landlord wants them out of 113th in 30 days. Ceaser decides to do everything in his power to save the shop. Meanwhile, Donna has an uncomfortable chat with Tati, and Walt hits rock bottom.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Walt and Jess decide on a destination wedding but when nobody responds to their invite they reach out to other friends from their past. Ceaser continues to deal with the prospect of losing 113th and the crew discovers Ted might have a wife.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Walt and Jess have a destination wedding in Hawaii. The 113th crew surprise the couple on the island but Ceaser gets the biggest surprise of all. Alex plans a big surprise of his own for Donna but Tati's secrets threaten to blow up everything.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: On the season finale, the crew attempts to keep it together for another day in paradise while Cease refuses a surprise reuniting with loathed O*hit. Kit defies pressure from Donna and Tati to leave the island. Alex finally pops the question to Donna.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After the New York city shutdown, Covid and the loss of his first Black Ink shop, Ceaser has a new lease on life and is determined to get the crew back together.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Things come to a head after Ceaser & Teddy confront Walter about the 125th break-in. Puma opens up about his pandemic anxiety, while Bae reveals she's been dealing with a severe illness.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Walt talks to Jess and deals with the consequences of his actions. Donna takes her CBD business to new heights, while Tatti continues to fight to regain her manager position.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Bae is officially back at the Brooklyn shop. Ceaser decides to relocate the entire crew to Atlanta but Puma's nerves get the best of him when someone tests positive for COVID.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew moves into their new mansion in Atlanta. Tatti gets a promotion at the shop, while Donna starts a new hustle that puts them on a collision course. Meanwhile, a family crisis devastates Ceaser.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After a rocky start in Atlanta, things only get worse as Rok and Krystal's relationship gets tested by an artist in the Atlanta crew. Donna and Tatti's argument over a space in the new shop spills over into their personal lives.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Tensions between Donna and the team come to a head when the Black Ink Bosses decide to bring the teams together for some team bonding in the woods.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Tired of the constant fighting over who the best tattoo artist is, Ceaser decides to have the Black Ink artists put their art where their mouth is by conducting the first Black Ink tattoo competition to crown the lead artist.

programme.desc: Everyone engages in an elaborate cover-up to help Steve ditch school and golf in a celebrity tournament.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: A Moving Experience
programme.desc: Mark accepts Trey's (REGGIE McFADDEN) offer to be his roommate in an apartment building filled with beautiful women and wild parties.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Livin' A Large Lie
programme.desc: When Mark's grandmother (MONTROSE HAGINS) visits him, he wants to impress her with his success and asks Robin and Vanessa to pose as his servants.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Baby Love

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Slumber Party
programme.desc: When Vanessa and Geneva get stranded in the middle of a forest due to a broken down car, Mark is forced to chaperone Nicole's slumber party by himself.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: School's a Drag
programme.desc: Mark gets in an accident with the school's drivers' education car and fears the tough, new principal, P.J. Moore, may discharge him. Sherman Hemsley and Don Cheadle guest star.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Limpin' Lizards
programme.desc: Nicole gets a part on the "Lester the Lizard and Crocodile Kids" show. When Mark complains about being assigned as the drivers' education teacher, PJ reassigns him to the home economics teacher position.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Free at Last
programme.desc: When Vanessa is not given the promotion she was promised, she takes Mark's advice to demand her rights and is promptly discharged from her job.

programme.desc: As Roc is giving boxing lessons to his friend's son, the boy confesses that his father is forcing him to be a boxer when he actually wants to be a ventriloquist.

programme.desc: When Dee Dee realizes that Mona has become friends with a woman she has had a long history of competing against, she tells Mona that she has to choose between this new friend and her own sister.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando el BAU investiga varios asesinatos en la zona de Pittsburgh, el equipo busca un par de sudes que trabajan en equipo. Además, García y Morgan comparten sus planes para el día de San Valentín con sus respectivas parejas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que nuevas pruebas revelen que el asesino de Puerto a Puerto se ha infiltrado en la agencia, los equipos del NCIS siguen todas las pistas en una carrera por localizarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, las vidas de los miembros del NCIS corren peligro cuando se enfrentan cara a cara con el infame asesino de Puerto a Puerto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las regals de la mafia
programme.desc: Decididos a hacer justicia por el ataque a Gormley, Danny y Frank buscan la ayuda del detective Anthony Abetemarco, quien tiene vínculos con el barrio donde ocurrió el ataque.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Por la comunidad
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony intentan evitar la deportación de la activista comunitaria Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), quien no es ciudadana, y Frank debe decidir si el NYPD participará en la redada de alto perfil de los Marshals de EE. UU. contra una pandilla local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El delator
programme.desc: Mientras Frank se enfrenta a un denunciante de la policía de Nueva York que afirma tener pruebas de abuso de poder en la organización, Danny y Báez investigan el caso de una mujer que fue atropellada por un coche en circunstancias sospechosas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando unos cuerpos ahogados misteriosamente son descubiertos en el desierto de Las Vegas, el UAC trata de averiguar la verdadera causa y el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The team bonds are tested when the Rednecks must rely on each other's strength and endurance to win the challenge. A new romance develops and causes controversy in the house.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A late-night prank angers the house and puts huge targets on the prankster's backs. The rednecks have a hard time keeping down what Steve is dishing up at the challenge and then a grudge match is settled at The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The pressures of the game are getting to some of the contestants and a wild night out causes tempers to flare. This week's challenge proves to be too much for two of the players to handle.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as a relationship continues to create friction in the house. The rednecks must prove they have brains as well as brawn as the latest challenge puts them to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Down to the final 4 teams, the remaining rednecks plot to take out whoever stands in their way of making it to the end. At the challenge, the players put it all on the line as they overcome any obstacles standing in their way.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Having survived the competition so far, the day they've all been waiting for arrives as the final three teams battle it out in an epic race of strength, intelligence, and endurance.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Brian Boucher is passionate about three things: trucking, family, and racing. Brian's away from his wife and two kids for months at a time so the boys transform Brian's beat-down Volvo into a well-oiled machine fit for any racing fan!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Josh Mullen is a musician who's doing everything he can to make it in the music business. As his band plays gigs all over the Midwest, the boys turn Josh's beat-down band van into a bodacious 1950s beach woody that'll be sure to turn heads on the road.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Lance Burk is the young owner of a feed delivery business and he really enjoys being his own boss. For the first time ever, the boys team up with Hollywood to transform Lance's old Kenworth into the Iron Man truck influenced by the blockbuster film.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Driving a truck is the only career David Goad has ever wanted and he considers it his job to help keep America's economy rolling. David's kids contact the boys and get them to turn David's worn-out Kenworth into a tribute to America's Old West.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jay Whiteford's success in the trucking business is due to hard work and family support. Now, twenty-five years later, Jay's truck is on its last legs so the boys work to overhaul Jay's old Freightliner into a rolling tribute to Jay's career roots.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Derek Lepke has turned his passion for the outdoors into three very successful careers which operate out of his pickup truck. It's wearing down from overuse so the boys transform Derek's Ford F250 into a leopard-printed safari truck from down under!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Rick Julian is the proud owner of a wrecking business and a volunteer with his local fire and police departments. The boys help give thanks to Rick by turning his beat-up Freightliner flatbed into a tribute to rescue vehicles.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: All Wade Hill really wants is a dependable truck he can be proud of so he can spend more time with his family. The boys turn Wade's run-down Pete 359 into a rolling tribute to Wade's favorite hobby: snowmobiling.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: David Tenpenny gave up his truck driving career in order to teach automotive mechanics in a small Kansas town, but driving never left his heart. David's class calls up the boys, who transform David's truck into a rolling educational workshop.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Gary The Honey Man Grose loves two things: honey making and educating people about honey making. Gary depends on his truck to haul everything from Honey jars to honeybees so they turn Gary's old flatbed Hino into the ultimate honey-dripping hive.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Matt Kolb is a proud grandfather and 32 year veteran of the road. Known as a kid at heart, Matt's always looking for a good time. But the bad economy and poor shape of his truck have this former wild child feeling down.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jeff White was a proud truck driver with 17 years of experience under his belt. But his career came to a stop when his daughter Amanda suffered severe injuries in a car accident.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Todd Gauthier put his love of truck driving to the side for his son, Brian. Trucking money was not enough to put Brian through college, so Todd sacrificed his love of the road for a better paying job.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mike Richardson is an American hero. He served our country during the Vietnam War and was awarded two purple hearts. After the war, Mike got into trucking.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: While attempting to break up a fight between two women an officer is attacked by one of the brawler’s boyfriends. Officers confiscate a negligible amount of marijuana from a man during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver leaves her car during a routine traffic stop, officers stop a car that appears to have fake tags, and police respond to an altercation between a father and son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man suspected of shoplifting attempts to ditch his clothes, and officers respond to a dispute between a shopkeeper and a man suspected of paying with counterfeit money.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Desapareció una noche

programme.title: El maquinista
programme.desc: Trevor lleva más de un año con problemas para dormir. Cuando aparecen notas en su casa y sus alucinaciones causan un accidente, tratará de descubrir si hay un complot para enloquecerlo, o si su cansancio le ha hecho perder la razón.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: Fuera de control
programme.desc: La sociedad moderna traza líneas entre el bien y el mal, la furia y la redención. Un momento de ensimismamiento y una chispa de ira harán que dos hombres las atraviesen. La lucha se intensifica, y las vidas de ambos cambian para siempre.

programme.title: La fuerza de la verdad
programme.desc: Henry es un abogado exitoso que necesita ganar a toda costa, incluso si debe sacrificar a su familia. Pero un disparo detiene el veloz ascenso de Henry, dejándolo incapacitado y sin recuerdos de su vida anterior.

programme.title: Sospecha Mortal
programme.desc: Richard Gere es Peck, y Andy Garcia es Raymond Avila, un investigador decidido a llevar a Peck a la justicia en este thriller policial emocionante.

programme.title: Verano en Louisiana
programme.desc: La historia de una joven que llega a la mayoría de edad y se enamora de su vecino.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Juegos del corazón
programme.desc: Una pareja de casados que renovarán sus votos, una mujer enfocada en su carrera perseguida por un encantador extraño, y una joven pareja que se conoce en un club de LA. Una comedia romántica sobre parejas modernas que se unen de maneras inesperadas.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: Legalmente rubias

programme.title: About Adam
programme.desc: Cuando la despreocupada Lucy (Kate Hudson) al fin conoce a su hombre perfecto, Adam (Stuart Townsend), está lista para sentar cabeza de verdad. Pero mientras Lucy está ocupada planeando la boda, Adam está ocupado ¡encantando al resto de su familia!

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Un policía fuerte (Jason Statham, "Fast & Furious 7") es designado para atrapar a un asesino en serie que ataca a oficiales de policía. Con Paddy Considine, Aiden Gillen, Mark Rylance y Luke Evans.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Un equipo de agentes especiales internacionales debe llevar a cabo una misión misteriosa: robar un maletín fuertemente custodiado buscado tanto por el IRA como por la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Escuadron oculto
programme.desc: Versión de la gran pantalla de la impactante serie de televisión de los 60. Un trío de delincuentes juveniles se convierten en policía secreta para infiltrarse en una red de tráfico de drogas en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Transpecos (LAS)
programme.desc: For three US Border Patrol agents, the contents of one car reveals a dark secret within their unit that could cost them all their lives. SXSW Grand Jury Award Winner 2016

programme.title: Juego letal

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo

programme.title: Secuestro Express

programme.title: Mientras Duermes

programme.desc: Fue amor a primera vista entre José y Abril, pero un accidente causa la muerte de José. En el cielo lo tiene todo, excepto a Abril. José convence a su ángel de la guardia de dejarlo volver a Tierra.

programme.title: Cholitas

programme.desc: Art el payaso regresa y pone su mirada en tres mujeres jóvenes, junto con cualquiera que se meta en su camino.

programme.title: Sospechoso cero
programme.desc: Un agente del FBI que investiga la muerte de un asesino serial sigue la pista de un justiciero que dedica su vida a perseguir asesinos seriales.

programme.title: Terrifier (LAS)

programme.title: La profecía 2: soldados de Dios

programme.desc: Christopher Walken protagoniza en The Ascent, la tercera película de la saga, La profecía. Mientras los ángeles desatan la guerra en la Tierra, un semi-humano descubre por su ángel guardián Gabriel, que deberá salvar el mundo.

programme.title: La Profecía 4: La Revelación
programme.desc: Cuando un antiguo manuscrito religioso cae en las manos de una joven ignorante, pronto ella se verá metida en el centro de una batalla épica entre ángeles caídos despiadados, que moverán el cielo y tierra para obtener el libro de las profecías.

programme.desc: Hogan sneaks out of camp to a local German Hofbrau House to get the details of a nearby German army unit.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans want to safely build a synthetic fuel plant in Stalag 13, but Hogan convinces them that there is oil beneath the camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: During an operation to send out twenty Allied soldiers, two of them attempt an early escape and are nearly captured.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan talks Klink into building an officers' club, whereby a boat can be built to sail away with an escaped British POW and the German gunsight he snagged while escaping.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a charmingly sweet doe wanders onto the Douglas farm, an enchanted Lisa befriends the beautiful animal. Having had her heart won over, Lisa resolves to have all deer hunting banned in Hooterville, winning support however necessary.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa becomes enchanted with the diary of a Lydia Plunkett. Found in an old trunk in the barn, the diary from 1898 tells Lydia's life story as a successful businesswoman. Eb and Lisa are glued to every page of the story, but Oliver isn't impressed.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney and Fred Ziffel try to persuade Oliver to invest in a new business venture. 'Looney Luke' Needlinger claim to have invented a machine that can turn hay into fresh milk. Oliver is skeptical and tries to prove the machine is a white lie.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver returns home with Arnold, the citizens in town hold a large reception for Arnold. But when Oliver receives a phone call from a lawyer representing an eccentric relative of the Birnbachers, the riches go into question.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's 'Mudder' pays a surprise visit to Lisa and Oliver. Eb good-naturedly introduces her as the Queen of Sicily. As a result, the entire town treats her like royalty. They even go so far as to hold a special day in her honor.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie steals a box of nails and a drill from work in order to do so home improvements. He soon finds himself at the center of a household debate on morality and becomes worried that Irene will report him when she finds out he has work property.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith takes a life expectancy quiz in a magazine and the results state that Edith will live to be a ripe old age. However, when Archie takes the quiz, it only gives him another seven years of life.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith goes to Scranton to attend a family wedding. Once there, Edith is reunited with a childhood friend whom she was once smitten with and briefly entertains the notion of infidelity.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: After a woman asks Archie to put out is cigar, Archie defends his smoking habit. Soon, the Bunker house is locked in a battle of wills after Mike vows he can go without food longer than Archie can abstain from smoking.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck's behavior is stranger than ever, but this time her tall tales are costing everyone money. When Maude finds out Mrs. Naugatuck has taken everyone for a ride, she's determined to get to the bottom of the con.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: A chance meeting with her ex-husband sparks an old flame in Vivian...and Maude adds fuel to the fire by unwittingly encouraging Viv to see Chuck along.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: What makes Maude tick? Fearing she's fallen out of love with Walter, Maude seeks counseling from a psychiatrist and, in a unique one-woman performance by series star Beatrice Arthur, pours out her innermost thoughts and memories.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes Sparta when a young alcoholic woman, Holly Maynard, kills a child, Denia Larson, in a hit-and-run accident; however, a second and unexpected tragedy sadly follows, which will expose certain tragic failures of the justice system.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Marissa and David, interracial sweethearts at Sparta High School, are targeted by a racist sniper who takes a shot at Marissa. Many people in town assume that David was the real target, because he’s Black, but then why was only one shot taken?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los crímenes más descarados del siglo 20. Adolph Coors III, el ejecutivo de Coors Brewing Company, fue secuestrado y retenido para un rescate.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el verano de 1986, el cuerpo de Kathleen Lipscomb fue encontrado en una carretera desierta en las afueras de San Antonio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El sospechoso principal tenía un historial criminal y su licencia de conducir se encontró en la escena del crimen de un brutal homicidio doble.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El caso musical
programme.desc: En 1999, una niña de 12 años fue encontrada asesinada en su casa y cambió la sensación de seguridad que tenían los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Waseca, Minnesota.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un caso inusual involucrando la violación y muerte de Nancy DePriest en 1988. Después de que Chris Ochoa confesara, el caso fue cerrado. 8 años después, Achim Marino confesó al mismo crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora
programme.desc: Armada con solo eso, la policía esperaba que las huellas de zapatos encontradas en la escena del crimen de Michigan, volvieran a encarrilar su investigación sobre el asesinato de Audrey Nichols.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores del hospital no pudieron determinar la causa de las alucinaciones y el intenso dolor de Bobby Curley. Lo trataron como un trastorno neurológico pero su estado se deterioró. Él estaba siendo envenenado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino forestal
programme.desc: Un asesino intentó incinerar y destruir todo lo que pudiera relacionarlo con su crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a un popular profesor de gimnasia muerto por lo que parece ser una herida de bala accidental, su familia se pone sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la casa de un policía se incendia, los expertos sospechan de un incendio provocado. El oficial cuya casa fue incendiada arresta al narcotraficante de bajo nivel James Wren, quien confiesa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Darlene Vander Giesen recibió correos electrónicos amenazantes y luego desapareció. Rastrear los correos electrónicos llevó a la policía a la casa de Daphne Wright, donde creen que se cometió un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A young father in California calls 911 after being in a shootout in a car full of strangers that injures two people and kills another.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police initially suspect natural causes as they investigate a man's death, until they learn about an unconventional love triangle, which points the investigation in a new direction.

programme.desc: Motivational speaker Rebecca Musser talks about her life in The Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and what made her leave the denomination.
